creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Anton Saietskii from comment #29)
> I'd like to kindly ask you to not rebase patches, at least in my PRs if possible.

I will try to remember this, but as I am working through the PRs with patches to
try to bring them up to modern standards (and, so that we can automate parts of
the task of committing them), it will be difficult for me to remember one
submitters out of hundreds.
